title: Dreamon Kid Diecast Metal Cars Engineering Vehicles Set,Construction Toys for Boys 3 Year Olds Sand Pit Play (6pcs Set)
features: Pack of 6 metal diecast construction vehicle Set : Excavator, Road Roller ,Dumper, Mixer, Bulldozer, Fork truck.
Made of high-quality ABS plastic and alloy metal material, safety and durable for playing.
A great vehicle set to keep kids hours of fun and also a perfect present for vehicle lovers.
Not only kids truck toys, but also perfect for construction theme birthday cake topper.
Great for ages 3 years and up playing in the sand pit or indoors.
description: Product Description Safe and reliable metal material The materials of Dreamon construct toy are mainly high-quality die-cast metal and ABS plastic. They are very safe, durable, and will not hurt your children or break easily. Adjustable Direction & Movable The wheels of all cars are slidable, you can slide with just one push, no battery or charging is required, which can bring unlimited fun to children. Size Excavator: 4.5×3×6.5cm Forklift : 7.5×3×4.5 cm Dump Trucks: 7×4×4 cm Cement: 7.5×3×3 cm Steamroller: 7.5×3×4 cm Bulldozer length: 7×4×4 cm Summer beach The parts of these small trucks can be excavated or rotated, and they can also be loaded with sand. It simulates the construction scene, which is very suitable for role playing. Develop children's hands-on and thinking skills. Make their summer more interesting! Winter snow Not only can you play on the beach in summer, but you can also play on the snow when winter comes. Put these six small cars next to the snowman to create a lovely snow scene to help improve children's cognition and imagination. Winter can also be very interesting! Indoor In Halloween, Christmas, Easter, etc. you can use these small trucks to decorate different places indoors and have a happy holiday. Outdoor Outdoors, you can use these small trucks on the grass and sand to let your children feel the joy of simulation. Summer beach Winter snow Indoor Outdoor Decoration These trucks have fine workmanship, and the ratio of 1:64 is very suitable for decorating architectural birthday cakes as a cake topper. The special decoration allows your child to have a special birthday party.
